title: PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT is not supported
description:
### What happens?

```sql
CREATE TABLE my_table (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,  -- 自增字段
    name TEXT,
    age INTEGER
);
INSERT INTO my_table (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', 25);
```

result:

```console
SQL 错误: Constraint Error: NOT NULL constraint failed: my_table.id
```


### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE my_table (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,  -- 自增字段
    name TEXT,
    age INTEGER
);
INSERT INTO my_table (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', 25);
```

### OS:

x86_64

### DuckDB Version:

1.1.3

### DuckDB Client:

dbeaver 24.3.0

### Hardware:

_No response_

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE my_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0));
INSERT INTO my_table (name, age) VALUES ('Bob', NULL);
SELECT * FROM my_table WHERE age IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES my_table(id));
key_bug_features: PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT not supported in table creation
